calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-23-2008 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Reimbursement For Costs Advanced On Behalf Of And For Protection Of Estate And Hiers
Off Calendar Mar-13-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Christina Nelson for Alysa Jenkins DeMarinis (Heir). John Leutza for Debra Dolch (Administrator). Teresa Green for and with Hollye Jenkins (Former Administrator).

Ms. Green stated that all papers had been field. Ms. Nelson stated that mediation had been attempted, but failed. The parties presented argument regarding the following issues:
1)Personal loans, 2)Reimbursement for mortgage payments, 3)Breach of fiduciary duty and 4)Request for attorneys fees from Alysa Jenkins. The Court took the matter under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR# 11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Lewis.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES
Off Calendar Mar-13-2008 Text Ruling

Petition For Reimbursement For Costs Advanced On Behalf Of And For Protection Of Estate And Hiers
Off Calendar Dec-26-2007 Continued To Jan-30-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. TERESA L. GREEN FOR HOLLYE JENKINS;
ATTY. JOHN N. LEUTZA FOR THE ADMINISTRATOR DEBRA DOLCH;
ATTY. CHRISTINA GALLAGHER NELSON FOR ALYCEA JENKINS DEMARINIS (HEIR).

MR. LEUTZA REQUESTED THE COURT FOR A CONTINUANCE ON THE MATTER TO ALLOW HIM TO FILE AN OBJECTION. THE COURT CONTINUED THE MATTER TO JANUARY 30, 2008. THE ADMINISTRATOR TO FILE A RESPONSE BY JANUARY 14 AND SUBSEQUENT RESPONSES TO BE FILED BY THE PARTIES ON JANUARY 23, 2008.

Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Peggy Tsujimoto, CSR #5229 Clerk: Cynthia Herbert. Bailiff: Deputy Cruz

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES
Off Calendar Dec-26-2007 Continued To Jan-30-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Reimbursement For Costs Advanced On Behalf Of And For Protection Of Estate And Hiers
Off Calendar Dec-12-2007 Continued To Dec-26-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
ATTY. TERESA L. GREEN APPEARING FOR HOLLYE JENKINS (FORMER ADMINISTRATOR ) ATTY. CHRISTINA GALLAGHER NELSON FOR ALYCSA JENKINS DE MARTINIS (HEIR);ATTY. JOHN N. LEUTZA APPEARING FOR DEBRA DOLCH (ADMINISTRATOR).

ATTY. LEUTZA REPORTED TO THE COURT THAT ALL PARTIES ARE AGREEABLE TO CONTINUING THE MATTER TO ALLOW THE ADMINSTRATOR TO RESPOND TO THE PLEADINGS AND REVIEW THE ACCOUNTING. HE ASKED THE COURT IF HE COULD GET AN EX PARTE ORDER FOR DISTRIBUTION OF $20,000 TO THE BENEFICIARIES AND THAT HOLLYE JENKINS SHARE WILL BE DEDUCTED FOR THE VALUE OF THE CAR. AN EX PARTE PETITION SHALL BE FILED. THE COURT CONTINUED THE MATTER TO DECEMBER 26, 2007.

JUDGE: JOHN DEARMAN; REPORTER: KATH BERSAMIN, CSR, 1172; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; BAILIFF: FELICIA SMITH

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (291 Ramsell St., San Francisco, Ca 94132)
Off Calendar Sep-25-2007 Written Order Received
MINI MINUTES: John Leutza appearing for administrator Debra Dolch. Terms of sale stated by counsel. Sale is confirmed at $565,000.00. Bond was waived. Counsel will prepare the order.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Rob Harris.

Petition By Personal Representative For Leave To Resign And For Appt. Of Neutral Third Party Successor Administrator
Off Calendar Aug-13-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Teresa Green appearing for and with Hollye Jenkins; Debra Dolch (Proposed Successor Administrator); Steven Weinkauf (Counsel for Public Administrator); Christina Gallagher Nelson for Alycsa Jenkins.

The Court granted both Petitions and appointed Debra Dolch the Successor Administrator with full authority (signing the Orders for same in open court). Bond was waived by all parties. The Final Accounting by the former Administrator must be filed no later than two weeks before October 29, 2007. No appearances are required if the accounting is filed timely.

Judicial Officer: Commissioner Dorothy L. McMath; Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722; Bailiff: Saephan; Clerks: R. Michael Diles and C. Joy Guandique.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Aug-13-2007 Granted Per Written Order

Petition By Personal Representative For Leave To Resign And For Appt. Of Neutral Third Party Successor Administrator
Off Calendar Jul-30-2007 Continued To Aug-13-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Christina Nelson, appearing for heir A. Jenkins, Steven Weinkauf, Public Administrator, Teresa Green, appearing for for Hollye Jenkins.
Ms. Dolch is to become administrator, but will not do so until the property is vacated. The court states that Ms. Dolch is to file petition to become adminsitrator. Ms. Dolch agrees to serve with stipulation. Proper notice was not give to Mr. J. Neal and shoud be done. The African Art collection should be delivered to Ms. Dolch by 8/10/07. Ms. Nelson ask the court to order to have the property vacated and the art delivered, if not Ms. Jenkins be held in contempt. The court orders that Ms. Dolche to recieve the art no later than 8/10/07 and the the stipulation be signed by all heirs. Ms. Dolch shall have independent powers by 8/13/07 upon the signing of the stipulation. The bond is waived. The matters are continued until 8/13/07.
COMMISSIONER:DOROTHY MCMATH, REPORTER:KATY BERSAMIN CSR #11722, CLERK:LARRISA DOTSON, BALIFF:R. SMITH

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Jul-30-2007 Continued To Aug-13-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition By Personal Representative For Leave To Resign And For Appt. Of Neutral Third Party Successor Administrator
Off Calendar Jun-25-2007 Continued To Jul-30-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Christina Gallagher Nelson appearing for and with Alycsa Jenkin DeMarinis, heir and daughter. Teresa Green appearing for and with Hollye Jenkins, petitioner/administrator. Parties are unable to work it out. Without an agreement, Court is in favor of appointing a neutral private professional fiduciary. Ms. Nelson argued that her client has priority to act. Court can not appoint anyone without a petition. Court will refer this case to the Public Administrator if no agreement is reached in 30 days. Matter is continued to 7/30.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Tony Santiago.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-14-2006 Granted Per Written Order
